tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show system interface
config system interface
    edit "port1"
        set vdom "root"
        set ip 7.0.14.1 255.255.255.0
        set allowaccess ping https ssh http
        set type physical
        set lldp-reception enable
        set role wan
        set snmp-index 1
    next
    edit "port2"
        set vdom "root"
        set ip 192.168.1.1 255.255.255.0
        set allowaccess ping https ssh http
        set type physical
        set device-identification enable
        set lldp-transmission enable
        set role lan
        set snmp-index 2
    next
    edit "port3"
        set vdom "root"
        set type physical
        set snmp-index 3
next
    edit "port4"
        set vdom "root"
        set type physical
        set snmp-index 4
    next
    edit "port5"
        set vdom "root"
        set type physical
        set snmp-index 5
    next
    edit "port6"
        set vdom "root"
        set type physical
        set snmp-index 6
    next
    edit "port7"
        set vdom "root"
        set type physical
        set snmp-index 7
    next
    edit "port8"
        set vdom "root"
        set type physical
set snmp-index 8
    next
    edit "port9"
        set vdom "root"
        set type physical
        set snmp-index 9
    next
    edit "port10"
        set vdom "root"
        set type physical
        set snmp-index 10
    next
    edit "naf.root"
        set vdom "root"
        set type tunnel
        set src-check disable
        set snmp-index 11
    next
    edit "l2t.root"
        set vdom "root"
        set type tunnel
        set snmp-index 12
    next
    edit "ssl.root"
set vdom "root"
        set type tunnel
        set alias "SSL VPN interface"
        set snmp-index 13
    next
    edit "fortilink"
        set vdom "root"
        set fortilink enable
        set ip 10.255.1.1 255.255.255.0
        set allowaccess ping fabric
        set type aggregate
        set lldp-reception enable
        set lldp-transmission enable
        set snmp-index 14
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config firewall address
 edit "UbuntuComputer"
  set subnet 192.168.1.3 255.255.255.255
 next
end
config firewall addrgrp
 edit "Blocked_Internet_Exfil"
  set member "UbuntuComputer"
 next
end
config firewall policy
 edit 0
  set name "Allow_Ubuntu_to_LAN_ICMP"
  set srcintf "port2"
  set dstintf "port2"
  set action accept
  set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
  set dstaddr "all"
  set schedule "always"
  set service "PING"
  set nat disable
  set logtraffic all
 next
 edit 0
  set name "Allow_Ubuntu_Web_to_Internet"
  set srcintf "port2"
  set dstintf "port1"
  set action accept
  set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
  set dstaddr "all"
  set schedule "always"
  set service "HTTP" "HTTPS"
  set nat enable
  set logtraffic all
 next
 edit 0
  set name "Deny_Ubuntu_Exfil_To_Internet"
  set srcintf "port2"
  set dstintf "port1"
  set action deny
  set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
  set dstaddr "all"
  set schedule "always"
  set service "ALL"
  set logtraffic all
 next
end
show firewall policy"}

tool_calls.content:
config firewall address

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (address) #  edit "UbuntuComputer"
new entry 'UbuntuComputer' added

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (UbuntuComputer) #   set subnet 192.168.1.3 255.255.255.255

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (addrgrp) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 100
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid f9d90c40-2937-51f1-d69d-ea2eba750bce
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat enable
    next
    edit 2
        set name "Allow_Ubuntu_to_LAN_ICMP"
        set uuid 64b69c6e-294a-51f1-ccce-5835adc4cf94
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port2"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "PING"
        set logtraffic all
next
    edit 3
        set name "Allow_Ubuntu_Web_to_Internet"
        set uuid 64c652d0-294a-51f1-9065-a4af9b515ff7
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "HTTP" "HTTPS"
        set logtraffic all
        set nat enable
    next
    edit 4
        set name "Deny_Ubuntu_Exfil_To_Internet"
        set uuid 64da8476-294a-51f1-4084-6e5333a849d9
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set logtraffic all
next
end

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config firewall policy
 move 4 before 3
 move 3 before 100
 move 2 before 3
end
show firewall policy"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
config firewall policy

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) #  move 4 before 3

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) #  move 3 before 100

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) #  move 2 before 3

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 2
        set name "Allow_Ubuntu_to_LAN_ICMP"

        set srcintf "port2"

        set action accept

        set dstaddr "all"

set nat enable

        set dstintf "port1"

next
